title: GHRP-2
description: GHRP-2 (Growth Hormone Releasing Peptide-2) is a synthetic hexapeptide that stimulates growth hormone release through the ghrelin receptor. It provides reliable GH release and is popular for anti-aging, muscle building, and fat loss.

research.title: GHRP-2 attenuates muscle atrophy markers in myocytes
research.summary: GHRP-2 directly reduces Atrogin-1 and MuRF1 mRNA levels in muscle cells through ghrelin receptor activation, potentially preventing muscle degradation.

research.title: Identification of GHRP-2 in nutritional supplements
research.summary: GHRP-2 was detected and quantified in over-the-counter supplements, raising performance enhancement concerns in elite sports contexts.

research.title: GHRP-2 increases food intake in healthy men
research.summary: Subcutaneous GHRP-2 administration increases appetite in humans similarly to ghrelin, providing insights into eating behavior mechanisms.

research.title: GHRP-2 vs GHRP-6 growth hormone release comparison
research.summary: Both peptides stimulate GH release from rat pituitary cells through identical receptors despite structural differences.

research.title: GHRP-2 and GHRH synergistic GH release in swine
research.summary: Combined GHRP-2 and GHRH administration produces synergistic growth hormone stimulation, diminishing with repeated dosing.

research.title: GHRP-2 reduces oxidative stress but not atherosclerosis
research.summary: GHRP-2 decreases vascular oxidative stress in ApoE-deficient mice without reducing atherosclerosis development.

sentiment.summary: Users report improved sleep, recovery, and gradual body composition changes. Often combined with GHRH peptides for synergistic effects. Reliable and well-tolerated.

effects.label: Reliable Results:
effects.description: Consistent GH release in most users.

effects.label: Synergistic:
effects.description: Best results when combined with GHRH (CJC-1295).

dosage.label: Timing:
dosage.description: Best on empty stomach, especially before bed.
